title: Draft RBI (Local Area Banks – Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Third Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The amendment redefines revenue reserves by excluding provisions for liabilities and depreciation. This ensures clearer classification and more accurate financial reporting by banks.
The post Draft RBI (Local Area Banks – Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Third Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
